name: Misdirection Successful Rarely
technique: misdirection
platforms: [x]
tags: [misdirection, surprise, hidden-behavior, consistency, one-liner]
source_month: "2025-01"
---

## Why It Works

It's a simple misdirection. You assume all successful people are extraordinary, but I take extraordinary away, and instead pair it with a hidden behavior (consistency) and then follow up with a painful (and likely personal) shot at everyone else.

## Template

The most successful people are rarely [Assumptive positive].
They [Actual Positive] with [Hidden Behavior] while everyone else is [Bad Behavior].

## Example

Here's an example using the template, written from the perspective of a personal trainer:

The most successful physiques I know are rarely in the gym 7-days per week.
They do explosive workouts coupled with purposeful rest while wannabe's are exhausting themselves silly.
